magicLink.title: Sign in to Health Dashboard
magicLink.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a sign-in link
magicLink.sentDescription: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Click the link to continue — it expires in 5 minutes.

newUser.title: Welcome! What's your name?
newUser.subtitle: You're almost in. Add your name to personalize your experience.

clearData.confirm: This permanently deletes all locally stored health data on this device. This cannot be undone.

privacy.heading: Your data stays on your device
privacy.dataLocal: All health data is stored locally in your browser. Nothing is ever uploaded to our servers or shared with anyone.
privacy.llmNote: When you use AI insights, only anonymised summaries (e.g. "7-day step average: 8,200") are sent — never raw records, never personal identifiers.
privacy.disclaimer: This app is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for any health concerns.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
